mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO index_daily (ts_code, trade_date, close, open, high, low, pre_close, `change`, pct_chg, vol, amount) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.close}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.preClose}, #{item.changeValue}, #{item.pctChg}, #{item.vol}, #{item.amount})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM index_daily WHERE
(ts_code = #{item.tsCode} AND trade_date = #{item.tradeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT ts_code, MAX(trade_date) AS latest_trade_date FROM index_daily GROUP BY ts_code

SELECT t.code FROM ( SELECT '000001.SH' AS code UNION SELECT '399001.SZ' UNION SELECT '399006.SZ' UNION SELECT '000300.SH' UNION SELECT '000905.SH' UNION SELECT '000852.SH' ) t WHERE t.code NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ts_code FROM index_daily WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate} )
